subject: Chinchou — small blue-yellow anglerfish-like creature with two glowing antennae, floating in shallow water.
description: A small, rotund blue creature floats in a shallow, sun-lit aquatic environment. The creature has a wide rounded body, small fins, and two stalked antennae tipped with glowing yellow orbs. The palette is dominated by pale blue and yellow. The background shows bright, sun-dappled water with sandy or light-colored bottom. The mood is warm and bright despite the aquatic setting.
foreground: small round blue creature with two yellow glowing antennae tips, floating in water
background: sun-lit shallow water, sandy floor, warm light
